name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the `src/data_loader.py` file is intended to load the "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" dataset, the provided code is a minimal placeholder and does not contain actual implementation for loading or preparing the dataset. The evidence from the trajectory indicates that there were issues with data loading and preparation, such as missing values and data type mismatches, which were not resolved. Therefore, the requirement for using and preparing the dataset in `src/data_loader.py` is not fully satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the `src/data_loader.py` file is implemented to standardize data, as indicated by the trajectory evidence, there is a warning about feature values being outside the expected range. This suggests that not all features may have been properly standardized, which could affect the data processing accuracy. The presence of this warning indicates that the requirement for ensuring all feature values are within the same range has not been fully satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the project structure indicates that the `elbow.jpg` file is present in the specified directory, the content of the file is unreadable due to an error indicating an unsupported image format. This suggests that the file may not have been saved correctly or is corrupted, thus failing to meet the requirement of successfully saving the elbow plot in a valid format.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that the K-means clustering algorithm is implemented in `src/model.py` is not satisfied. The content of `src/model.py` provided does not show any implementation of the K-means algorithm. Instead, it contains a placeholder function `build_model()` and some metadata, but no actual code for K-means clustering. Additionally, the trajectory evidence mentions the execution of `src/model.py` for K-means clustering, but without the actual code in the file, this cannot be verified.

<UNSATISFIED>: The requirement that cluster centers are stored in `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt` is not satisfied. The content of the file is shown as `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates that the actual cluster centers are not present. Instead, it contains a placeholder, suggesting that the expected data has not been correctly saved or updated in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the project documentation indicates that the customer segmentation was performed using "seaborn" and the plot was saved successfully, the content of the file `customer_segmentation.png` shows an error related to an unsupported image format. This suggests that the image file is not valid or accessible, which means the requirement to have a working visualization of customer segmentation is not fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason: <SATISFIED>: The evidence from the trajectory indicates that the "app.py" file was executed using Dash, and the dashboard functioned as expected, allowing for interactive exploration of segments. This confirms that an interactive dashboard was created using Dash, meeting the requirement.
